# v2.0.4

## Changes

- Removed the dashboard's separate comments view so the UI focuses on review findings.
- Kept findings visible in the navigation, run lists, and run detail pages.
- Kept comment storage and API data intact for internal audit/debugging.

## Assets

- Windows x86_64: `gitlab-work-runner-v2.0.4-windows-x86_64.zip`
- Ubuntu x86_64: `gitlab-work-runner-v2.0.4-linux-x86_64.tar.gz`
